Title: Verify User Authentication
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid username and password.
2. System attempts to authenticate the user.
3. System checks if the credentials match the stored data.
4. System displays a success message if authentication is successful.
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to the main interface.

Title: Verify Invalid User Authentication
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid username and password.
2. System attempts to authenticate the user.
3. System checks if the credentials match the stored data.
4. System displays an error message if authentication fails.
Expected Result: User is not authenticated and an error message is displayed.

Title: Verify Data Display Interaction
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to the data display.
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with the data display.
2. Data display requests data from the data organizer.
3. Data organizer retrieves data from Firebase.
4. Data display displays the retrieved data.
Expected Result: Data display correctly shows the requested data.

Title: Verify Data Organizer Interaction with Firebase
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to the data display.
Test Steps:
1. Data display requests data from the data organizer.
2. Data organizer retrieves data from Firebase.
3. Firebase processes the request and returns the data.
4. Data organizer forwards the data to the data display.
Expected Result: Data organizer correctly retrieves and forwards the data from Firebase to the data display.

Title: Verify Chat Creation
Test Steps:
1. User creates a new chat.
2. System generates a unique chat identifier.
3. System stores the chat identifier and URLs.
4. System associates the chat with the user.
Expected Result: Chat is created successfully and stored in the system.

Title: Verify Message Sending
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a chat.
Test Data: Message content, chat identifier, and receiver.
Test Steps:
1. User sends a message.
2. System generates a unique message identifier.
3. System stores the message content, chat identifier, and receiver.
4. System associates the message with the user and chat.
Expected Result: Message is sent successfully and stored in the system.

Title: Verify Message Retrieval
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a chat.
Test Steps:
1. User requests messages from a chat.
2. System retrieves messages associated with the chat identifier.
3. System displays the retrieved messages to the user.
Expected Result: Messages are retrieved and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Post Creation
Test Data: Post content, user nickname, fridge ID, type, and cost.
Test Steps:
1. User creates a new post.
2. System generates a unique post identifier.
3. System stores the post content, user nickname, fridge ID, type, and cost.
4. System associates the post with the user and fridge.
Expected Result: Post is created successfully and stored in the system.

Title: Verify Fridge Ownership
Test Steps:
1. User requests ownership of a fridge.
2. System verifies the user's credentials.
3. System associates the fridge with the user.
Expected Result: Fridge ownership is verified and associated with the user.

Title: Verify Product Removal from Fridge
Preconditions: User is authenticated and owns a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the removal of a product from the fridge.
2. Schema Principale sends a ChangeFragment() message to fragment Frigorifero.
3. Fragment Frigorifero sends a RimuoviProdotto() message to Firebase Database.
4. Firebase Database processes the request and removes the product.
Expected Result: Product is removed from the fridge and the change is reflected in the Firebase Database.
